results.title: GLM-4.5
results.description: GLM-4.5: An open-source large language model designed for intelligent agents by Z.ai

results.title: Z.AI
results.description: Z.AI is an AI open platform offering a suite of large language models (LLMs), vision language models, image generation, video generation, and audio models, along with various capabilities and SDKs for developers.

results.title: Z.AI Developer
results.description: Z.AI offers a comprehensive platform providing advanced large language models, multimodal AI capabilities for image and video generation, translation services, AI-powered coding assistants, and a suite of developer tools and APIs.

results.title: GLM-V
results.description: GLM-V is an open-source repository containing GLM-4.5V and GLM-4.1V series vision-language models, enhancing reasoning capabilities beyond basic multimodal perception for complex problem-solving and multimodal agents.

results.title: ZML
results.description: ZML is a high-performance AI inference stack built with Zig, MLIR, and Bazel, designed for production environments and supporting distributed inference across diverse hardware accelerators like GPUs and TPUs.

results.title: Glama AI (llmstxt)
results.description: Glama AI is a comprehensive platform offering access to MCP & AI models for collaborative data analysis, visualization, and management with a focus on user-friendliness and security.

results.title: AssemblyAI LLM Gateway
results.description: AssemblyAI LLM Gateway is a unified API interface that connects to multiple LLM providers including Claude, GPT, and Gemini, enabling sophisticated AI applications with support for chat completions, multi-turn conversations, tool calling, and agentic workflows.

results.title: LLM Scaler
results.description: LLM Scaler is a GenAI solution for text, image, and video generation, leveraging frameworks like vLLM, ComfyUI, and Xinference to ensure optimal performance for State-of-Art GenAI models on Intel Arc Pro B60 GPUs.

results.title: LiteLLM
results.description: LiteLLM provides a unified OpenAI-compatible interface to call and manage over 100 Large Language Models (LLMs) from various providers, offering features like retry/fallback logic, cost tracking, and consistent output, available as a Python SDK or a Proxy Server (LLM Gateway).

results.title: MLC LLM
results.description: MLC LLM is a universal LLM deployment engine with ML compilation, enabling optimized AI model deployment across diverse platforms.

results.title: Z.AI LLMs Full
results.description: Z.AI LLMs Full provides a comprehensive suite of large language model (LLM) powered services, including multilingual translation, AI-driven special effects video generation, and intelligent agents for content creation like slides and posters, alongside API tools for managing these services.

results.title: GAI
results.description: gai provides a unified interface for interacting with various large language model (LLM) providers, supporting multiple modalities, tool integration, and fallback strategies.

results.title: gcl_iam
results.description: A Genesis IAM library providing identity and access management functionalities.

results.title: AWS GenAI LLM Chatbot
results.description: An enterprise-ready and production-ready generative AI chatbot solution that enables organizations to deploy a secure, feature-rich chatbot powered by large language models (LLMs) with Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) capabilities.

results.title: vLLM
results.description: vLLM is a high-throughput and memory-efficient inference engine for large language models, designed to accelerate LLM serving with features like PagedAttention, continuous batching, and various quantization methods.

results.title: Clore.ai (llmstxt)
results.description: Clore.ai is a decentralized GPU leasing platform and compute power trading system, offering services like Clore VPN, GigaSPOT, and Proof of Holding.

results.title: Litellm
results.description: LiteLLM enables calling all LLM APIs using the OpenAI format, supporting providers like Bedrock, Huggingface, VertexAI, and more, with features like consistent output, retry logic, and budget management.

results.title: OpenGL Mathematics
results.description: GLM is a header-only C++ mathematics library for graphics software, based on GLSL specifications, providing classes and functions with similar naming conventions and functionality for seamless integration with graphics programming.

results.title: Open-AutoGLM
results.description: Open-AutoGLM is a multimodal phone agent framework that understands smartphone screens and automatically completes tasks through natural language commands via visual language models and ADB control.

results.title: Galaxy.ai
results.description: Galaxy.ai is an all-in-one AI platform offering access to premium AI models and tools for text, image, video, voice, coding, and data analysis under a single subscription.

results.title: DeepGEMM
results.description: DeepGEMM is a CUDA library for efficient General Matrix Multiplications (GEMMs) supporting FP8 and BF16, designed for simplicity and high performance in normal and MoE scenarios.

results.title: Web LLM
results.description: WebLLM is a high-performance in-browser LLM inference engine that leverages WebGPU for hardware acceleration, enabling powerful LLM operations directly within web browsers without server-side processing.

results.title: GGML
results.description: ggml is a low-level, cross-platform tensor library for machine learning with features like integer quantization, automatic differentiation, and broad hardware support, designed with no third-party dependencies.

results.title: Glood.AI (llmstxt)
results.description: Glood.AI provides AI-powered personalized recommendations, upsell bundles, and search merchandising to boost sales for e-commerce stores.

results.title: BioLM Public
results.description: BioLM.ai provides secure, scalable, GPU-backed APIs for accelerating inference, generation, and large language modeling with DNA and proteins, supporting both hosted models and custom finetuning for biotech AI applications.

results.title: CGLM
results.description: cglm is a highly optimized, allocation-free, header-only math library for C, providing fast and ergonomic math functions for graphics programming, also known as OpenGL Mathematics (glm) for C.

results.title: Any-LLM
results.description: Any-LLM provides a simple, unified interface to access various LLM providers, leveraging official SDKs for compatibility and ease of use.

results.title: Turbine LLM
results.description: Turbine LLM is a unified Rust library providing a single interface for interacting with multiple Large Language Model (LLM) providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and Groq, designed for flexible AI application development.

results.title: ZBrain (llmstxt)
results.description: ZBrain is an enterprise generative AI platform that helps businesses assess AI readiness, identify opportunities, and deploy custom AI solutions and agents.
